items.title: Doom's new Chain Spear weapon seems to be dividing The Dark Ages' audience - "I'm like an hour in and I can't wait to get the shield back"
items.snippet: Only a few weeks after Doom: The Dark Ages - Revelations was revealed to the world, Xbox has made deep cuts to developer id Software that could change the studio and their games forever. But for now, players seem to be enjoying the expansion - albeit for one divisive new weapon.

items.title: Workers at MindsEye studio protesting controversial fan event this weekend after multiple rounds of layoffs
items.snippet: Members of Build a Rocket Boy, the development studio behind the often maligned MindsEye, will be picketing outside the studio's Edinburgh offices this Saturday, 11th July. The workers are protesting a fan event the developer is hosting this weekend. Read more
